PATHOLOGY REPORT — DERMATOLOGY
Patient: King, Michelle | DOB: 07/22/1980 | MRN: MRN45678431
Date of Procedure: 10/30/2025
Physician: Dr. Laura White, MD — Dermatology Center

DIAGNOSIS: D23.9 — Other benign neoplasm of skin, unspecified

PROCEDURES PERFORMED:
1. CPT 11102 — Tangential biopsy of skin, single lesion
2. CPT 11103 — Tangential biopsy of skin, each additional lesion

CLINICAL HISTORY:
Ms. King is a 44-year-old female referred for evaluation of two suspicious skin lesions identified during routine dermatologic screening. She has a family history of melanoma (mother, age 58) and personal history of multiple atypical nevi. Both lesions demonstrated clinical features warranting biopsy (asymmetry, border irregularity, color variation).

LESION DESCRIPTIONS AND ANATOMIC SITES:

Specimen A — LEFT UPPER BACK (Lesion 1):
- Site: Left upper back, posterior thorax (distinct anatomic site #1)
- Clinical appearance: 7mm irregularly bordered pigmented macule with color variegation (brown-black)
- Dermoscopic findings: Atypical pigment network, irregular dots/globules
- Biopsy method: Tangential (shave) biopsy (CPT 11102)

Specimen B — RIGHT ANTERIOR THIGH (Lesion 2):
- Site: Right anterior thigh (distinct anatomic site #2)
- Clinical appearance: 5mm papule

1. CPT 11102 — Tangential biopsy of skin, single lesion
2. CPT 11103 — Tangential biopsy of skin, each additional lesion

CLINICAL HISTORY:
Ms. King is a 44-year-old female referred for evaluation of two suspicious skin lesions identified during routine dermatologic screening. She has a family history of melanoma (mother, age 58) and personal history of multiple atypical nevi. Both lesions demonstrated clinical features warranting biopsy (asymmetry, border irregularity, color variation).

- Dermoscopic findings: Atypical pigment network, irregular dots/globules
- Biopsy method: Tangential (shave) biopsy (CPT 11102)

Specimen B — RIGHT ANTERIOR THIGH (Lesion 2):
- Site: Right anterior thigh (distinct anatomic site #2)
- Clinical appearance: 5mm papule

args.text: Triage review for DEN-022 / CLM-2025-00022: Anthem HMO denial CO-97 with remarks N657/MA130 states payment adjusted because procedure/service is included in allowance for another procedure/service. DOS 10/30/2025, Dermatology Center, Dr. Laura White. Claim billed CPT 11102 and add-on CPT 11103 for tangential biopsies; paid $0, adjusted $113.75, remaining balance $650. Pathology report supports two clinically suspicious skin lesions biopsied at distinct anatomic sites (left upper back and right anterior thigh) with diagnosis D23.9. Because the denial is a bundling/coding edit rather than medical necessity or prior authorization, route to Coding Review to validate 11102/11103 sequencing/add-on billing and determine whether corrected claim/modifier or coding-supported appeal is appropriate before deadline 05/20/2026.
